name: JoAi: Create Document

description.en: Save a document to your agent's knowledge base so it can reference the content in future conversations. Use this to store notes, articles, guidelines, templates, or any reference material your AI assistant should know about.
description.de: Speichere ein Dokument in der Wissensdatenbank deines Agenten, damit er den Inhalt in zukünftigen Unterhaltungen nutzen kann. Ideal für Notizen, Artikel, Richtlinien, Templates oder anderes Referenzmaterial, das dein KI-Assistent kennen soll.

bot: Use this when the user shares a piece of content that should be saved as a document, such as an article, note, template, or reference material.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: A concise title for the document.

inputs.name: Content
inputs.bot: The full content of the document.

inputs.name: Type

description.en: Document type (text, pdf, html, markdown, template)

inputs.bot: Document type. Use 'template' for reusable message templates. Default is 'text'.

inputs.name: Meta Slug
inputs.bot: Unique slug for template documents, e.g. 'handwerk-nurture-m1'. Ignored for non-template documents.

inputs.name: Meta App
inputs.bot: App name like 'outreach' or 'followups'. Ignored for non-template documents.

inputs.name: Meta Channel

description.en: Channel this template targets (whatsapp, email, linkedin, post)
description.de: Kanal für dieses Template (whatsapp, email, linkedin, post)

inputs.bot: Communication channel. Ignored for non-template documents.

inputs.name: Meta Step
inputs.bot: Integer step number in a multi-step sequence. Ignored for non-template documents.

inputs.name: Meta Delay Days

description.en: Days to wait before this step

inputs.bot: Days after the previous step. Ignored for non-template documents.

inputs.name: Meta Locale
inputs.bot: Language code. Ignored for non-template documents.

inputs.name: Meta Variables
inputs.bot: Template variables like 'name,company'. Ignored for non-template documents.
